text: This is the story of Kishan Lal Suthar, a grassroots innovator from Rajasthan. Farmers manually decorticating and grading groundnut after harvest spent significant time and labour on the process. He built a tractor-operated groundnut decorticator-cum-grader that mechanises shelling and sorting groundnut in one pass.

label.problem: Farmers manually decorticating and grading groundnut after harvest spent significant time and labour on the process.
label.solution: He built a tractor-operated groundnut decorticator-cum-grader that mechanises shelling and sorting groundnut in one pass.

text: In Anantnag, Jammu & Kashmir, painters and masons working along walls relied on wooden angle brackets to raise a working platform, but wood was getting costlier and the brackets had limited height range. Nisar Ahmad Itoo responded with a practical fix: he built a height-adjustable metal standing bar, adjustable from 5 to 15 feet, that gives construction workers a stable platform and can be disassembled for storage.

label.problem: Painters and masons working along walls relied on wooden angle brackets to raise a working platform, but wood was getting costlier and the brackets had limited height range.
label.solution: He built a height-adjustable metal standing bar, adjustable from 5 to 15 feet, that gives construction workers a stable platform and can be disassembled for storage.

text: In Rajasthan, farmers manually decorticating and grading groundnut after harvest spent significant time and labour on the process. Kishan Lal Suthar responded with a practical fix: he built a tractor-operated groundnut decorticator-cum-grader that mechanises shelling and sorting groundnut in one pass.

label.problem: Farmers manually decorticating and grading groundnut after harvest spent significant time and labour on the process.
label.solution: He built a tractor-operated groundnut decorticator-cum-grader that mechanises shelling and sorting groundnut in one pass.

text: In Idukki, Kerala, breaking open dry coconuts by hand for processing into copra, oil, or powder was unsafe, tiring, and slow work. Biju Narayanan responded with a practical fix: he built a portable device that splits a dry coconut in seconds using a falling blade and cam mechanism, while also filtering and collecting the coconut water, and can run manually or with an electric motor.

label.problem: Breaking open dry coconuts by hand for processing into copra, oil, or powder was unsafe, tiring, and slow work.
label.solution: He built a portable device that splits a dry coconut in seconds using a falling blade and cam mechanism, while also filtering and collecting the coconut water, and can run manually or with an electric motor.

text: The local sugarcane juice market was informal and often unhygienic, giving customers little confidence in a healthier alternative to bottled soft drinks. That was the situation Harkumar Goswami set out to change in Guwahati, Assam. He built a self-operated vending machine that dispenses hygienic sugarcane juice with card, UPI, and wallet payment options, designed to be set up as a public kiosk.

label.problem: The local sugarcane juice market was informal and often unhygienic, giving customers little confidence in a healthier alternative to bottled soft drinks.
label.solution: He built a self-operated vending machine that dispenses hygienic sugarcane juice with card, UPI, and wallet payment options, designed to be set up as a public kiosk.

text: Sanjeev Kumar, from Vaishali, Bihar, noticed that farmers wanted an early-maturing cauliflower cultivar with bigger, more compact curds than the traditional varieties they were growing. To solve this, through selective breeding over several years, he developed the 'Sanjeev Selection' cauliflower, an early, high-yielding variety with compact white curds.

label.problem: Farmers wanted an early-maturing cauliflower cultivar with bigger, more compact curds than the traditional varieties they were growing.
label.solution: Through selective breeding over several years, he developed the 'Sanjeev Selection' cauliflower, an early, high-yielding variety with compact white curds.

text: Chilli farmers in his district had no effective treatment for leaf curl disease and the whitefly and thrips that spread it. That was the situation Hom Prasad Chauhan set out to change in South Sikkim, Sikkim. He developed a fermented herbal preparation from local plants that reduces leaf curl disease and pest populations in chilli while boosting yield.

label.problem: Chilli farmers in his district had no effective treatment for leaf curl disease and the whitefly and thrips that spread it.
label.solution: He developed a fermented herbal preparation from local plants that reduces leaf curl disease and pest populations in chilli while boosting yield.

text: Standard stretchers jolt patients uncomfortably when carried over rough, uneven ground outside hospitals. That was the situation Hema Pradhan set out to change in West Sikkim, Sikkim. After watching a patient be carried over rough terrain, she proposed a stretcher fitted with a spring-based shock absorber to cushion the ride.

label.problem: Standard stretchers jolt patients uncomfortably when carried over rough, uneven ground outside hospitals.
label.solution: After watching a patient be carried over rough terrain, she proposed a stretcher fitted with a spring-based shock absorber to cushion the ride.

text: Painters and masons working along walls relied on wooden angle brackets to raise a working platform, but wood was getting costlier and the brackets had limited height range. That was the situation Nisar Ahmad Itoo set out to change in Anantnag, Jammu & Kashmir. He built a height-adjustable metal standing bar, adjustable from 5 to 15 feet, that gives construction workers a stable platform and can be disassembled for storage.

label.problem: Painters and masons working along walls relied on wooden angle brackets to raise a working platform, but wood was getting costlier and the brackets had limited height range.
label.solution: He built a height-adjustable metal standing bar, adjustable from 5 to 15 feet, that gives construction workers a stable platform and can be disassembled for storage.

text: Hema Pradhan, from West Sikkim, Sikkim, noticed that standard stretchers jolt patients uncomfortably when carried over rough, uneven ground outside hospitals. To solve this, after watching a patient be carried over rough terrain, she proposed a stretcher fitted with a spring-based shock absorber to cushion the ride.

label.problem: Standard stretchers jolt patients uncomfortably when carried over rough, uneven ground outside hospitals.
label.solution: After watching a patient be carried over rough terrain, she proposed a stretcher fitted with a spring-based shock absorber to cushion the ride.

text: In West Sikkim, Sikkim, standard stretchers jolt patients uncomfortably when carried over rough, uneven ground outside hospitals. Hema Pradhan responded with a practical fix: after watching a patient be carried over rough terrain, she proposed a stretcher fitted with a spring-based shock absorber to cushion the ride.

label.solution: After watching a patient be carried over rough terrain, she proposed a stretcher fitted with a spring-based shock absorber to cushion the ride.

text: Ram Prasad Meher, from Bargarh, Odisha, noticed that the same slow, hand-powered thread-winding process used in Sambalpuri saree weaving was limiting how much a weaver's workshop could produce. To solve this, working independently, he built his own version of an automatic weft-winding machine that winds cotton bundles far faster than manual winding.

label.problem: The same slow, hand-powered thread-winding process used in Sambalpuri saree weaving was limiting how much a weaver's workshop could produce.
label.solution: Working independently, he built his own version of an automatic weft-winding machine that winds cotton bundles far faster than manual winding.

text: This is the story of Ram Prasad Meher, a grassroots innovator from Bargarh, Odisha. The same slow, hand-powered thread-winding process used in Sambalpuri saree weaving was limiting how much a weaver's workshop could produce. Working independently, he built his own version of an automatic weft-winding machine that winds cotton bundles far faster than manual winding.

label.problem: The same slow, hand-powered thread-winding process used in Sambalpuri saree weaving was limiting how much a weaver's workshop could produce.
label.solution: Working independently, he built his own version of an automatic weft-winding machine that winds cotton bundles far faster than manual winding.

text: This is the story of Durlov Gogoi, a grassroots innovator from Dibrugarh, Assam. Selling fresh green tea leaves to large factories earned small tea garden owners like him very little per bag, and existing tea dryers he tried weren't good enough to process his own leaves profitably. After years of trial and error, he built a reciprocating 'push-pull' tea dryer that dries tea leaves efficiently, letting small growers process and sell their own dried tea.

label.problem: Selling fresh green tea leaves to large factories earned small tea garden owners like him very little per bag, and existing tea dryers he tried weren't good enough to process his own leaves profitably.
label.solution: After years of trial and error, he built a reciprocating 'push-pull' tea dryer that dries tea leaves efficiently, letting small growers process and sell their own dried tea.

text: In Guwahati, Assam, the local sugarcane juice market was informal and often unhygienic, giving customers little confidence in a healthier alternative to bottled soft drinks. Harkumar Goswami responded with a practical fix: he built a self-operated vending machine that dispenses hygienic sugarcane juice with card, UPI, and wallet payment options, designed to be set up as a public kiosk.

label.problem: The local sugarcane juice market was informal and often unhygienic, giving customers little confidence in a healthier alternative to bottled soft drinks.
label.solution: He built a self-operated vending machine that dispenses hygienic sugarcane juice with card, UPI, and wallet payment options, designed to be set up as a public kiosk.

To solve this, he built a portable device that splits a dry coconut in seconds using a falling blade and cam mechanism, while also filtering and collecting the coconut water, and can run manually or with an electric motor.

label.problem: Breaking open dry coconuts by hand for processing into copra, oil, or powder was unsafe, tiring, and slow work.
label.solution: He built a portable device that splits a dry coconut in seconds using a falling blade and cam mechanism, while also filtering and collecting the coconut water, and can run manually or with an electric motor.

text: Transplanting paddy seedlings by hand is slow, back-breaking work that ties up labour at a critical point in the season. That was the situation Sadasibo Majhi set out to change in Odisha. He built a manual paddy transplanter that lets a farmer transplant seedlings faster and with less strain than transplanting entirely by hand.

label.problem: Transplanting paddy seedlings by hand is slow, back-breaking work that ties up labour at a critical point in the season.
label.solution: He built a manual paddy transplanter that lets a farmer transplant seedlings faster and with less strain than transplanting entirely by hand.

He built a tractor-operated groundnut decorticator-cum-grader that mechanises shelling and sorting groundnut in one pass.

label.problem: Farmers manually decorticating and grading groundnut after harvest spent significant time and labour on the process.
label.solution: He built a tractor-operated groundnut decorticator-cum-grader that mechanises shelling and sorting groundnut in one pass.

text: Faced with a familiar rural problem — the same slow, hand-powered thread-winding process used in Sambalpuri saree weaving was limiting how much a weaver's workshop could produce — Ram Prasad Meher came up with a grassroots solution. Working independently, he built his own version of an automatic weft-winding machine that winds cotton bundles far faster than manual winding.

label.problem: The same slow, hand-powered thread-winding process used in Sambalpuri saree weaving was limiting how much a weaver's workshop could produce.
label.solution: Working independently, he built his own version of an automatic weft-winding machine that winds cotton bundles far faster than manual winding.

text: This is the story of Ishwar Singh Kundu, a grassroots innovator from Kaithal, Haryana. Farmers relying on separate chemical products for soil fertility and pest control faced higher costs and more chemical use. He developed a multi-utility herbal formulation that works as a bio-fertiliser, soil enhancer, and pest-control treatment in one product, cutting the need for multiple separate chemical inputs.

label.problem: Farmers relying on separate chemical products for soil fertility and pest control faced higher costs and more chemical use.
label.solution: He developed a multi-utility herbal formulation that works as a bio-fertiliser, soil enhancer, and pest-control treatment in one product, cutting the need for multiple separate chemical inputs.

He developed a fermented herbal preparation from local plants that reduces leaf curl disease and pest populations in chilli while boosting yield.

label.problem: Chilli farmers in his district had no effective treatment for leaf curl disease and the whitefly and thrips that spread it.
label.solution: He developed a fermented herbal preparation from local plants that reduces leaf curl disease and pest populations in chilli while boosting yield.

text: This is the story of Uddhab Bharali, a grassroots innovator from Lakhimpur, Assam. Deseeding pomegranates by hand for juice or processing was slow and inefficient for small producers. He built a low-cost pomegranate deseeder, one of more than 160 low-cost devices he has invented for everyday rural and small-industry problems.

label.problem: Deseeding pomegranates by hand for juice or processing was slow and inefficient for small producers.
label.solution: He built a low-cost pomegranate deseeder, one of more than 160 low-cost devices he has invented for everyday rural and small-industry problems.

text: This is the story of Maharaj Singh Lodhi, a grassroots innovator from Raisen, Madhya Pradesh. A conventional tractor-mounted cultivator could not reach proper tilling depth in the hard soil on his farm. He developed a combined tillage implement with a modified plough and PTO-powered auger that performs both primary and secondary tilling operations in a single pass.

label.problem: A conventional tractor-mounted cultivator could not reach proper tilling depth in the hard soil on his farm.
label.solution: He developed a combined tillage implement with a modified plough and PTO-powered auger that performs both primary and secondary tilling operations in a single pass.

text: Selling fresh green tea leaves to large factories earned small tea garden owners like him very little per bag, and existing tea dryers he tried weren't good enough to process his own leaves profitably. That was the situation Durlov Gogoi set out to change in Dibrugarh, Assam. After years of trial and error, he built a reciprocating 'push-pull' tea dryer that dries tea leaves efficiently, letting small growers process and sell their own dried tea.

label.solution: After years of trial and error, he built a reciprocating 'push-pull' tea dryer that dries tea leaves efficiently, letting small growers process and sell their own dried tea.

text: Faced with a familiar rural problem — deseeding pomegranates by hand for juice or processing was slow and inefficient for small producers — Uddhab Bharali came up with a grassroots solution. He built a low-cost pomegranate deseeder, one of more than 160 low-cost devices he has invented for everyday rural and small-industry problems.
